title: rofoo's  Deepfish and Quake
description: A resource pack for redrawing two modded mobs.
body:
> This resource pack remakes two unique mobs from the [Species](https://modrinth.com/mod/species) mod, as well as related content. _**Quake**_ and _**Deepfish**_ receive updated textures, improved visuals and enhanced details to fit a modern Minecraft style.
> ### 
> ### 
>
>
>
